zh.speaker: A
zh.text: 看那个视频了吗？那个印尼小孩在船头跳舞那个

zh.speaker: B
zh.text: 啊啊啊！那个就是传说中的 aura farming！

zh.speaker: A
zh.text: 哈哈他戴个墨镜一脸淡定地在船头晃，太有那味儿了

zh.speaker: B
zh.text: 这就是纯纯的 aura farming 精髓——看起来毫不费力，其实全是小心机

en.speaker: A
en.text: Did you see that video? The Indonesian kid dancing on the bow of the boat

en.speaker: B
en.text: OMG! That's literally the legendary aura farming!

en.speaker: A
en.text: Hahaha he just stood there with sunglasses looking so unbothered

en.speaker: B
en.text: That's the essence of aura farming—looking effortless while being calculated

definitions.en: The act of intentionally doing something to look cool, impressive, stylish, especially without trying too hard
definitions.zh: 故意做某事让自己看起来酷、有魅力、不费力

definitions.en: Cultivating an appearance of effortless charisma or "coolness" through repetitive, stylized actions
definitions.zh: 通过重复的、有风格的行为来打造毫不费力的魅力形象

examples.en: Posted a matcha pic with a book? That's pure aura farming.
examples.zh: 发了张抹茶配书的照片？完全是 aura farming。

examples.en: Walking into school with those sneakers? Pure aura farming.
examples.zh: 穿着那双球鞋走进学校？完全是在 aura farming。

examples.en: He stood there with his arms crossed and cape flowing—that's so Piccolo aura farming.
examples.zh: 他双手交叉站在那里，披风飘动——这就是皮卡丘的 aura farming。

examples.en: You're aura farming if you're flexing too hard and trying desperately to look cool.
examples.zh: 如果你太用力地炫耀、拼命想显得酷，那你就掉进了 aura farming 的陷阱。

origin: Aura farming combines 'aura' (a person's unique charismatic aesthetic) with 'farming' (repetitive behavior to acquire something in video games). The trend exploded in 2024-2025, especially through anime fandom, and went global in mid-2025 when 11-year-old Rayyan Arkan Dikha's boat dance video went viral. The term has been officially recognized by Cambridge Dictionary, Dictionary.com, and Merriam-Webster.
